title: asterocephalus micranthus
intro: Asterocephalus micranthus, also known as the Dwarf Starwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Asterocephalus micranthus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and soothe respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
